Launch an official provider login flow

Source: R/setup.R
ravel_launch_login.Rd

Launch an official provider login flow

Usage

ravel_launch_login(
  provider = c("openai", "copilot", "gemini", "anthropic"),
  mode = NULL
)

Arguments

provider

Provider name.

mode

Optional auth mode override.

Value

A login plan list, invisibly.

On this page
